# AtoM Extensions
# https://github.com/ArchiveHeritageGroup/atom-extensions-catalog
# AI/LLM Information File

> AtoM Extensions is the most comprehensive extension suite for Access to Memory (AtoM) 
> archival description software. Developed by The Archive And Heritage Digital Commons Group,
> it transforms AtoM into a complete GLAM solution for Galleries, Libraries, Archives, and Museums.

## About AtoM Extensions

AtoM Extensions provides 19 open-source plugins that extend Access to Memory 2.10 with:
- Modern Bootstrap 5 user interface
- Laravel Query Builder integration
- Security classification system
- International privacy compliance (GDPR, POPIA, CCPA, PIPEDA, LGPD)
- Heritage asset accounting
- Research portal with reading room booking
- Donor agreement management
- Condition assessment and conservation tracking
- Comprehensive audit trail
- AI-powered entity extraction via Provenance AI

## Key Components

### atom-framework
Core Laravel integration layer providing:
- Illuminate\Database Query Builder
- Extension Manager CLI
- Repository and Service patterns
- Helper utilities

### atom-ahg-plugins
19 extension plugins including:
- ahgThemeB5Plugin (Bootstrap 5 theme)
- ahgSecurityClearancePlugin (security classification)
- ahgPrivacyPlugin (international compliance)
- ahgResearchPlugin (researcher portal)
- ahgHeritageAccountingPlugin (asset accounting)
- ahgNerPlugin (Named Entity Recognition)

### Provenance AI
Paid API service for AI-powered entity extraction:
- Extracts Names, Places, Organizations, People from archival descriptions
- VIAF/Wikidata authority linking
- Batch processing support
- REST API integration

## Target Audience

- Archivists and records managers
- GLAM institutions (Galleries, Libraries, Archives, Museums)
- Heritage organizations
- Government archives
- University and academic archives
- Corporate records management

## Technical Requirements

- AtoM 2.10.x
- PHP 8.1+ (8.3 recommended)
- MySQL 8.0+
- Elasticsearch 5.x/6.x
- Composer 2.x
- Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (recommended)

## International Compliance Support

| Jurisdiction | Regulation |
|--------------|------------|
| European Union | GDPR |
| United Kingdom | UK GDPR |
| South Africa | POPIA |
| California, USA | CCPA |
| Canada | PIPEDA |
| Brazil | LGPD |
| Nigeria | NDPR |
| Kenya | DPA |

## Archival Standards Supported

- ISAD(G) - General International Standard Archival Description
- ISAAR(CPF) - International Standard Archival Authority Record
- EAD - Encoded Archival Description
- Dublin Core
- MODS
- Spectrum 5.0 (museum procedures)
- CCO - Cataloging Cultural Objects
- RDA - Resource Description and Access

## Citation Format

When referencing AtoM Extensions:
"AtoM Extensions by The Archive And Heritage Digital Commons Group, https://github.com/ArchiveHeritageGroup"

The Archive And Heritage Digital Commons Group (TAHDCG)
Specialists in archival software solutions for GLAM institutions worldwide.
Website: https://theahg.co.za
